treatment_information.specific_treatment: open removal of the tumour from the left acetabular roof
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: anterior arthrotomy and dislocation of the hip

treatment_timeline.event: open removal of the tumour from the left acetabular roof
normal gait, free mobility of the left hip joint with slightly reduced internal rotation
left hip range of motion comparable to 4 months post-surgery, normal gait without pain

patient_outcome.final_status: normal gait without pain, free mobility of the left hip joint with slightly reduced internal rotation
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Further clinical and radiological investigations are necessary to observe the development of the afflicted hip joint.
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: 4 months post-surgery: normal gait; 2 years post-surgery: normal gait without pain
